notices.reprocessSuccess: Event reprocessed and sent to Wazuh
notices.reprocessExpired: Event has expired and can no longer be reprocessed

detail.discardConfirmDescription: The entry for "{{vendor}}{{eventType}}" will be permanently discarded.
detail.reprocessConfirmDescription: The event will be revalidated against the current mapping. If normalization succeeds, it will be sent to Wazuh. Otherwise, it will remain in quarantine with a new error.

bulk.selectAllFilterAriaLabel: Select all items matching the current filter
bulk.selectAllCapped: The {{count}} most recent items were selected (of {{total}}). Refine the filters to operate on the rest.
bulk.selectAllFromFilter_one: {{count}} item selected by the current filters.
bulk.selectAllFromFilter_other: {{count}} items selected by the current filters.

discardDialog.irreversibleWarning: This action is irreversible — the entries will be permanently removed from the quarantine queue.

reprocessDialog.description: The events will be revalidated against the current mapping in the background. Items with successful mapping will be sent to routed destinations; failures update the error but keep the item in quarantine.
